content.en:
"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, for the sake of Shijing Domain Ancestor, don't kill me. You may not know the Shijing Domain Ancestor, but the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord knows that he is a top Domain Ancestor, but he has reached the consummation level at the top Domain Ancestor level, and he is only one step away from breaking through to the strongest Domain Ancestor!"

The Ancestor of the Six Extremes Domain hurriedly said.

"Top Domain Ancestor?" Ye Tian sneered: "You shouldn't know my identity, I have now become the first holy son of the Battle Gate, one of the ten holy gates of the Dark Sacred Domain, the top domain ancestor is nothing at all, even the strongest domain ancestor is not a high-level in the battle gate, only the invincible domain ancestor is barely a high-level." And my status is higher than that of ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestors, what are you talking to me about Shijing Domain Ancestors? Believe it or not, if I say a word, there will be Invincible Domain Ancestors who have crossed the Dark Forbidden Domain to come here? Besides, just the top Domain Ancestors, do you think they can threaten me?"

"This ......"

The Ancestor of the Six Extremes Domain was stunned.

The Stone Spirit Domain Ancestor was the top existence in the Divine Heaven Realm, but he didn't expect it to be useless for him to move out of the Stone Crystal Domain Ancestor.

And the Wind Mountain Lord is not familiar with him, he just knows the existence of the Wind Mountain Lord, and it is impossible for the Wind Mountain Lord to help him speak.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, do you really want to kill me?"

The Six Extremes Domain Ancestor asked.

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian affirmed.

"No matter how big your background is, the powerhouse of the Dark Sacred Domain can't come over in a short time, but the Shijing Domain Ancestor may not be long before he arrives here, you are definitely not the opponent of the Shijing Domain Ancestor, you kill me to offend the Shijing Domain Ancestor, and invite murder, why bother?"

The Ancestor of the Six Extremes Domain roared.

"Then let him come, just in your company!"

After Ye Tian finished speaking, he directly pressed a hand on the shoulder of the Six Extremes Domain Ancestor.

The next moment.

The Ancestor of the Six Extremes Domain turned to ashes and completely fell and died.

"Don't kill me!"

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, I know it's wrong!"

"Don't!"

......

Boom Boom Boom !!!

One by one, the elite domain ancestors were like ants, turning into ashes one by one in full view of everyone.

This is the Five Elite Domain Ancestors!

And the domain ancestor was the goal of their life, but now these five elite domain ancestors were easily wiped out by Ye Tian.

Among them, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master trembled all over.

They all knew about the existence of these five Elite Domain Ancestors, they were powerful Elite Domain Ancestors, even more powerful than their Vast Sea Ancestors, they were the famous Elite Domain Ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm!

But now, they are dead.

What does this mean?

Even if it was the Vast Sea Ancestor, if he offended Ye Tian, he would be killed easily.

"Fortunately, the Emperor of Heaven did not rise to the top, otherwise I am afraid that there would be an Emperor of Heaven among the people who fell today!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord muttered.

The death of the five elite domain ancestors had a great impact on everyone.

Especially the Wind Mountain Lord, he knew that he underestimated Ye Tian, and he thought that Ye Tian was comparable to the Elite Domain Ancestor, but Ye Tian easily captured the five Elite Domain Ancestors, and it seemed that there was no fierce battle.

Otherwise, he would definitely be able to sense it.

This shows that Ye Tian's strength far exceeds that of these five elite domain ancestors, and he may not have reached the top domain ancestor level, but it is definitely not far away.

Such a strong man may be enough to compete with the Black Wind Mountain Lord of their Black Wind Mountain, and even vaguely press on it!

Although Ye Tian was still a member of Black Wind Mountain, he didn't dare to use Black Wind Mountain to bind Ye Tian.

Subsequently.

A half-step domain ancestor left, and the matter was publicized.

In the future, if there is a domain ancestor who re-enters the Xuanxu taboo realm, I am afraid that it will have to be low-key, otherwise the fate of the five elite domain ancestors will be their fate in the future.

Ye Tian returned to the human world, and an acquaintance found Ye Tian.

"Jiu'er, why are you here?"

Ye Tian asked.

Ouyang Jiu'er pleaded: "Brother Ye, I know that your strength is very strong now, I am afraid that you can easily kill the Haohai Sea Ancestor, I am afraid that I will not be able to kill the Haohai Sea Ancestor in my life, so I beg you to avenge me!"

"Kill the Ancestor of the Great Sea?"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment.

"Isn't it okay?" Ouyang Jiu'er was worried that Ye Tian was unwilling, and was a little nervous.

"You can do it then!" Ye Tian said with a smile: "However, I won't kill him, I will ban his strength, how about you kill him personally?"

"Thank you, Brother Ye!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said excitedly.

this day.

Ye Tian descended on the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

"Haohai Sea Ancestor, come out!"

Ye Tian's voice filled the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Wow!

The incarnation of the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord walked out and said respectfully: "I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, I don't know why the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor came to so-called something?"

"Looking for your Vast Sea Ancestral Heavenly Emperor!"

Ye Tian said directly.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master smiled and said, "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, don't be joking, the Vast Sea Ancestor is in the Divine Heaven Realm, and we can't call out the Vast Sea Ancestor from such a distant Dark Forbidden Domain!"

"Are you sure?" Ye Tian said coldly: "If it weren't for the fact that the Haohai Sea Ancestor is here, I will come here?" Not long ago, you personally went to the edge of the Dark Forbidden Domain and picked up the Hao Hai Sea Ancestor to return, don't you know about me?"

"This ......"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord's expression changed drastically.

This matter is very secretive, but they secretly went to greet the Vast Sea Ancestor, how did this matter leak?

How did the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor know, could it be that he just happened to see it?

But at that time, why didn't the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor appear?

He didn't even know that someone inside him had reported the news.

The True Martial Palace Master is Ouyang Jiu'er's subordinate, so he will naturally pass on information.

Therefore, the people of the Heavenly Emperor Palace couldn't hide it from Ye Tian.

"Haohai Ancestor really hasn't come back!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord still said the same.

"It seems that the Heavenly Emperor Palace doesn't want to exist anymore!"

Ye Tian held the Heaven Killing Spear in his hand and stabbed it with a spear.

Bang!!!!!

The Great Array of the Heavenly Emperor Palace completely shattered, and there was not even a chance to block a move.

Suddenly, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master and others were shocked.

The large array of their Heavenly Emperor Palace was enough to withstand the attacks of ordinary domain ancestors, even if it was the full force of the elite domain ancestors, they could not break the large array of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, which was also one of their dependences.

However, this kind of reliance was like paper paste in Ye Tian's eyes.

"It's horrible!"

Many palace masters said in fear in their hearts.

"Has the Mighty Sea Ancestor ever returned, you say!"

Ye Tian grabbed a half-step domain ancestor who had just been promoted and asked.

"Nope!"

The half-step domain ancestor replied.

"Then you will die!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian was about to kill him.

Under the fear of death, the half-step domain ancestor immediately replied: "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor don't kill me, the vast sea ancestor has come back, and now I don't know where it is, I don't know anything." The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master and the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, they know. At the beginning, the Vast Sea Ancestor only left the two of them, and it seemed that they were talking about that mysterious treasure, and I don't know about other things!"

As soon as these words came out, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master were extremely angry, and they were eager to kill this half-step domain ancestor.
